description.zh-cn: AI 商品图：对接 OpenAI 兼容的图像生成接口（DALL·E / 通义万相 / 豆包等兼容服务），按提示词文生图生成商品主图/场景图/营销海报底图，支持尺寸与数量，生成结果存入 storage 并在图库管理，可复制 URL 用于商品。
description.en: AI Image Studio: integrates an OpenAI-compatible image generation API (DALL·E / compatible services) to create product hero/scene/poster images from prompts, with size and count options; results are saved to storage and managed in a gallery.
